mano_cua.result_summary: Modal 成功打开/关闭，Escape 关闭后焦点返回触发按钮，Tab 键在 Modal 内切换焦点（观察到 close 按钮获得焦点环）。但 mano-cua 尝试通过 DevTools 验证焦点是否严格 trap 在 Modal 内时被中文 IME 和 allow pasting 阻塞，61 步超时未完成完整的焦点泄漏验证。部分观测偏向 normal 但无法确认。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Modal opens/closes correctly, Escape closes modal and returns focus to trigger button, Tab moves focus between modal elements (close button shows focus ring). But could not complete strict focus trap verification due to DevTools console IME issues.
